activeIngredients.name: Vitamin B-12
activeIngredients.harvestMethod: co-enzyme form, and Dibencozide Note: co-enzyme form) Note: 2,000 mcg
activeIngredients.notes: Vitamin B-12 (Form: as Cyanocobalamin, Methylcobalamin Note: co-enzyme form, and Dibencozide Note: co-enzyme form) Note: 2,000 mcg

statements.notes: Vitamin B-12 (Cyanocobalamin) is a water soluble vitamin necessary for the maintenance of a healthy nervous system and for the metabolic utilization of fats and proteins. Vitamin B-12 is also essential for the synthesis of DNA during cell division and therefore is especially important for rapidly multiplying cells, such as blood cells. In addition, adequate intake of Vitamin B-12, along with Folic Acid and Vitamin B-6, encourages healthy serum homocysteine levels, thereby supporting cardiovascular health. Because Vitamin B-12 is found predominantly in animal products, strict vegetarians are at risk of developing Vitamin B-12 deficiency and may benefit from supplementation.*
*These statements have not been evaluated by the FDA. This product is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure or prevent any disease.

• 3 Forms of B-12 including Co-enzyme Forms
• Essential for DNA Synthesis*

SUGGESTED USAGE: As a dietary supplement, take one lozenge daily. Chew lozenge or hold in mouth until dissolved. Consider taking this product in combination with NOW(R) B-Complex Vitamins, Omega-3 Fish Oil and Lecithin.
Contains no salt, yeast, wheat, gluten, milk, egg, shellfish or preservatives.
The B-12 content is derived by natural fermentation.
The B-12 content in each lozenge was produced with 70% Cyanocobalamin, 15% Methylcobalamin and 15% Dibencozide.
Do Not Eat Freshness Packet. Keep in Bottle.
Store in a cool, dry place.

labelText.raw:
Vitamin B-12 (Cyanocobalamin) is a water soluble vitamin necessary for the maintenance of a healthy nervous system and for the metabolic utilization of fats and proteins. Vitamin B-12 is also essential for the synthesis of DNA during cell division and therefore is especially important for rapidly multiplying cells, such as blood cells. In addition, adequate intake of Vitamin B-12, along with Folic Acid and Vitamin B-6, encourages healthy serum homocysteine levels, thereby supporting cardiovascular health. Because Vitamin B-12 is found predominantly in animal products, strict vegetarians are at risk of developing Vitamin B-12 deficiency and may benefit from supplementation.* *These statements have not been evaluated by the FDA. This product is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure or prevent any disease. ACTUAL
SIZE NERVOUS SYSTEM HEALTH Made in the U.S.A. • 3 Forms of B-12 including Co-enzyme Forms
• Essential for DNA Synthesis* SUGGESTED USAGE: As a dietary supplement, take one lozenge daily. Chew lozenge or hold in mouth until dissolved. Consider taking this product in combination with NOW(R) B-Complex Vitamins, Omega-3 Fish Oil and Lecithin. A Dietary Supplement
 Vegetarian Formula GMP QUALITY ASSURED Contains no salt, yeast, wheat, gluten, milk, egg, shellfish or preservatives. Vegetarian/Vegan Product. The B-12 content is derived by natural fermentation. The B-12 content in each lozenge was produced with 70% Cyanocobalamin, 15% Methylcobalamin and 15% Dibencozide. Do Not Eat Freshness Packet. Keep in Bottle. Store in a cool, dry place. Please Recycle. CODE 0459 V1
